case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS ZHANG, RAYMOND X. DBA RAYMOND CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, RAYMOND X. DBA RAYMOND CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, RAYMOND X. DBA RAYMOND CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, RAYMOND X. DBA RAYMOND CONSTRUCTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
